name: Refersion Affiliate Marketing API
what_it_does: Refersion affiliate and influencer marketing platform REST API for e-commerce brands and retailers to manage affiliate programs, track conversions, calculate commissions, and automate payouts. Enables AI agents to manage affiliate application and onboarding for affiliate program recruitment automation, handle conversion tracking and attribution for affiliate sales reporting automation, access commission calculation and structure management for affiliate payout automation, retrieve affiliate performance analytics for program optimization automation, manage coupon code creation and assignment for affiliate tracking automation, handle influencer campaign and content tracking for influencer marketing program automation, access fraud detection and transaction review for affiliate compliance automation, retrieve payout processing and payment management for affiliate compensation automation, manage affiliate tier and bonus program configuration for performance incentive automation, and integrate Refersion with Shopify, WooCommerce, BigCommerce, and e-commerce platforms for end-to-end affiliate program management.
use_cases: Onboarding affiliates from partner program recruitment agents
Tracking conversions from affiliate attribution automation agents
Processing commissions from affiliate payout automation agents
Optimizing affiliate programs from performance analytics agents
not_for: Enterprise complex affiliate network management at scale (use Impact or Partnerize)
B2B partner program and revenue sharing (use PartnerStack)
Retail media and co-op advertising programs
best_when: A DTC brand, Shopify merchant, or mid-market retailer wanting AI agents to automate affiliate recruitment, conversion tracking, commission calculation, and payout processing within Refersion's e-commerce-native affiliate marketing platform.
avoid_when: FTC DISCLOSURE REQUIREMENTS FOR AFFILIATE CONTENT: Automated affiliate and influencer campaign management via Refersion must ensure affiliate partners include FTC-required material connection disclosure in promotional content; automated campaign launch without affiliate disclosure compliance verification creates FTC endorsement guide violation for brand sponsor. COMMISSION FRAUD DETECTION BEFORE AUTOMATED PAYOUT: Automated commission payout via Refersion must implement fraud review before payment processing; automated payout of affiliate commissions without fraud score review creates payment of commissions from cookie stuffing, click fraud, and return fraud that inflate affiliate-attributed conversions. STATE NEXUS FOR AFFILIATE MARKETING TAX EXPOSURE: Affiliate program that includes affiliates in states with click-through nexus laws may create state sales tax nexus for the brand; automated affiliate onboarding without nexus analysis for affiliate's state of residence creates unexpected sales tax nexus in jurisdictions where the brand is not registered.

auth.notes: Refersion uses API key authentication. REST API with JSON. New York HQ. Founded 2013 by Mark Kahn. Acquired by Pantastic (private equity) in 2021. Native Shopify, WooCommerce, BigCommerce, and Magento integrations. Influencer and affiliate program management. Automated payout via PayPal, direct deposit. Coupon code and referral link tracking. Competes with PartnerStack, Tapfiliate, and Impact (formerly Impact Radius) for e-commerce affiliate management.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — monthly subscription for affiliate programs
pricing.paid_tiers: Professional, Business, and Enterprise monthly subscription tiers based on affiliate count and order volume; payout processing fees additional
pricing.notes: New York NY. Pantastic portfolio. Monthly subscription. Affiliate-count-based tiers. Payout fees. No free tier.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; affiliate and conversion queries throttled; webhooks for conversion and payout events

known_agent_gotchas: API KEY FULL ACCOUNT ACCESS: Refersion API key provides full account access without scope restriction; automated agents with API key can access all affiliate data, commission records, and payout information; implement application-level access control for multi-team affiliate program automation workflows

CONVERSION DEDUPLICATION FOR ORDER MANAGEMENT RETURNS: Refersion conversion tracking creates commission on order completion; automated return processing must trigger Refersion conversion reversal to cancel commission on returned orders; automated payout processing without return window expiration creates commission payments on subsequently returned orders

COUPON CODE EXPIRATION MANAGEMENT FOR AFFILIATE CAMPAIGNS: Automated affiliate campaign launch via Refersion creates unique coupon codes per affiliate; coupon code expiration must be managed in both Refersion and e-commerce platform; automated campaign with mismatched coupon expiration between Refersion and Shopify creates affiliate-generated discount codes that remain active after campaign end

MULTI-TOUCH ATTRIBUTION LAST-CLICK DEFAULT: Refersion default attribution is last-click for conversion credit; automated multi-channel programs must configure attribution model explicitly; automated commission calculation using default last-click attribution for influencer campaigns with assisted conversions understates top-of-funnel affiliate contribution and creates incentive misalignment

PAYOUT THRESHOLD AND TAX FORM REQUIREMENTS: Refersion automated payout requires affiliates to meet minimum threshold and complete W-9/W-8 tax forms for US reporting; automated payout trigger without verifying tax form completion and payout threshold creates payout attempt failure; implement affiliate compliance verification before automated payout processing
agent_readiness.security_notes: Affiliate marketing. SOC2. API key. US. Affiliate data, commission records, and payout information.

security_score_components.security_notes: Affiliate marketing. SOC2. API key. US. Affiliate, commission, and payout data.
